behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names the file (areal/utils/dataloader.py), the class to create (EvalDistributedSampler), the config (ValidDatasetConfig), and the required tooling (ruff, bandit, py_compile), all checked in tests.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes WHAT (no padding, drop_last=False) but not HOW to compute the no-padding indices; agent must reason about the algorithm.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check behavioral properties (sorted indices == range(ds_size), no duplicates, drop_last attribute) that any correct implementation would satisfy.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests execute create_dataloader and EvalDistributedSampler via subprocess, iterating samplers and checking indices.

test_not_tautological.reason: Tests assert sorted union of indices across ranks equals range(ds_size); a stub returning empty collection or constants would fail.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover no padding, no dropping, dispatch on ValidDatasetConfig, training unchanged, ruff/bandit/compile, no wildcard imports, type annotations, no trailing whitespace, EOF newline.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped by section comments (Gates, Fail-to-pass, Pass-to-pass, repo_tests, Config-derived) with descriptive names.

structured_data_schema.reason: Task is code behavior, not structured data output.

no_typos.reason: Paths and names are consistent across instruction, tests, and solution.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names the file but doesn't point to specific lines; localization within the file is left to the agent.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: Code-only task, not an agentmd-edits task.
